title: Support Page, and plans for the next updates

texts: Changed the Supporters page to a Support page with information on how to support the site, including the new Patreon link and a link to the Ko-Fi page.
Added filters for Clashable Guards and Counters
Added Team Draft, Artwork Guesser, and Voiceline Guesser to the Manager's Guide.

body.text: Hi! Over the next week or few weeks, you may see minimal updates on the site. I will be focusing on reworking the internals of the site. Most of these won't have any visible changes to users, and I likely won't be posting updates about them, but you may occasionally see the last updated time change on the site. The changes are primarily focused on making the site more easily crawlable by Google, but may also make loading some pages faster and less data intensive for people. I will continue adding new releases from the game, and fixing any bugs reported of course, but outside of that the updates will be focused on this for a while. Thanks!
